case_title: 560 SUTTER, LLC VS. SUNIL KASHYAP et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER THAT SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANTS BE MADE BY POST AND MAIL, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 560 SUTTER, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 560 SUTTER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KASHYAP, SUNIL COMPLETE SYSTEMS SOLUTIONS, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 560 SUTTER STREET, STE 410, S. F., CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 560 SUTTER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KASHYAP, SUNIL COMPLETE SYSTEMS SOLUTIONS, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 560 SUTTER STREET, STE 410, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 $3,025.00 RENT, $290.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,315.82, SEE SCANNED DOC
